caption:
🔥 Professoressa Elena, the university's most beautiful disaster, just got lost in the library stacks. My blouse, designed with strategic cutouts for a 9 a.m. lecture, whispered secrets as I leaned over to retrieve a book on the lower shelf. The dust motes dancing in the afternoon light seemed to trace paths along my collarbone. A shadowy figure emerged from behind the encyclopedias—my student, or so I thought. His eyes, sharp and hungry, lingered on the way my skirt hiked slightly as I bent. The air thickened with the scent of old paper and something sweeter. "Lost, Professoressa?" he asked, his voice a low rumble that vibrated against my spine. I smiled, feeling the heat bloom in my cheeks and core. "Just exploring," I purred, my hand grazing the fabric of his sleeve. "But I suppose I could use a guide..." 📚✨💃
